name: orkestr-lite
description: Run one persistent Codex workspace from your browser or WhatsApp.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @orkestr/shared && npm run build -w @orkestr/codex-client && npm run build -w @orkestr/web && npm run build -w @orkestr/server
scripts.build:server: npm run build -w @orkestr/shared && npm run build -w @orkestr/codex-client && npm run build -w @orkestr/server
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @orkestr/shared && npm run build -w @orkestr/web
scripts.demo:up: docker compose -f compose.yaml -f compose.demo.yaml --profile desk up --build -d
scripts.demo:down: docker compose -f compose.yaml -f compose.demo.yaml --profile desk down --remove-orphans
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run build && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run test:integration && npm run test:browser
scripts.check:release: npm run check && npm run audit && docker compose config --quiet
